messages.subject: [R-gui] New version (-17) of iWidgetsRGtk, pmg
messages.body_plain:
A new version (-17) of iWidgetsRGtk and pmg was uploaded to the
website http://www.math.csi.cuny.edu/pmg. The new version has a new
widget icheckboxgroup for selecting one or more from many, and some
bug fixes.

--John

messages.subject: [R-gui] new version of SimpleR, a Windows GUI to R
messages.subject_clean: [R-gui] new version of SimpleR, a Windows GUI to R
messages.body_plain:
Dear colleagues,
I would like to inform you that a new version of SimpleR, a Windows-based GUI for R is available at http://www-sre.wu-wien.ac.at/SimpleR . This version has new features for data management (subsetting of datasets, merging of datasets) and improved data handling functions. Please, send questions, comments and feedback to gunther.maier at wu-wien.ac.at .

Kind regards
Gunther Maier

-----------------------------------------------------------------------
*  Gunther Maier, University of Economics and Business Administration *
*     Augasse 2-6, Vienna, Austria. (Gunther.Maier at wu-wien.ac.at)     *
*      Newsletter Editor, European Regional Science Association       *
